$schema: Issue tracker for marcellourbani/abap-adt-api — API reference for ARC-1

issues.title: Feature proposal: Dynpro metadata access + ADT-backed source retrieval (non-native objects)
issues.relevance: Two-part feature proposal: (1) Dynpro (screen) metadata — ARC-1 doesn't support DYNT/screens at all. The ADT endpoint is /sap/bc/adt/dynpros/<program>/<screen>. (2) Non-native object source retrieval via SAP Note 2980930 extension endpoint for legacy types. Both are gaps in ARC-1.

issues.title: Issue in API runQuery
issues.relevance: runQuery API issue. ARC-1 has its own RunQuery — verify we don't have same problem.

issues.title: add language attributes support for object creation
issues.relevance: Language attributes on object creation — PR merged as commit ffa43d7. See commit evaluation.

issues.title: Example for Quickfix
issues.relevance: Quick fix (fix proposals) API usage example. ARC-1 doesn't expose fix proposals yet — valuable for auto-fix from ATC findings.

issues.title: Resource INCLUDE is not locked (invalid lock handle)
issues.relevance: Lock handle issues with includes. Verify ARC-1 lock handling for includes/class includes.

issues.title: ATC Worklist returning no entries?
issues.relevance: ATC worklist parsing issue. ARC-1 has own ATC implementation — verify worklist parsing.

issues.title: SAML authorization
issues.relevance: SAML auth request. ARC-1 uses OIDC/XSUAA, not SAML directly.

issues.title: This operation can only be performed in stateful mode
issues.relevance: Stateful session handling — some ADT operations require stateful mode. ARC-1 uses stateless by default. Verify lock/write operations set stateful correctly.

issues.title: Upgrade fast-xml-parser to version 4.24
issues.relevance: Dependency update. ARC-1 already uses fast-xml-parser v5.

issues.title: Unit tests support
issues.relevance: Unit test API was added. ARC-1 already has unit test support.

issues.title: creating behavior
issues.relevance: BDEF creation request. ARC-1 already supports BDEF write.

issues.title: dependency 'request' is deprecated
issues.relevance: Migrated to axios in v4.0.0. ARC-1 uses axios too.

issues.title: VirtualFolders API support
issues.relevance: Virtual folders API for BSP/UI5. Low priority for ARC-1.

issues.title: SSO Support?
issues.relevance: SSO request. ARC-1 already has OIDC/XSUAA/PP.

issues.title: Support request-debug
issues.relevance: Old logging request. Resolved by axios migration.

issues.title: Activate method does not work correctly
issues.relevance: Activation bug. Fixed. ARC-1 has own activation implementation.

issues.title: API docs and sequences
issues.relevance: API docs request — still open after 7 years. Shows the library's doc gap. ARC-1 can reference source code directly.

issues.title: setup CI
issues.relevance: CI request — still open. Shows project maintenance level.
